summary:
Agent1 inferred based on analogy with known dental structures that the cemento-dental junction has an estimated thickness between 2-3 micrometers due to smooth transitional nature at this interface.
The specific measurement for the cemento-dental junction isn’t explicitly stated; however, it’s reasonably assumed by comparison to adjacent tissue layers which typically have widths measured similarly near their boundaries. Sentence focusing primarily on answering what was asked while acknowledging limitations regarding direct citation or explicit data provided. To be more precise would require referencing studies detailing measurements specifically taken across these regions if available rather than relying solely upon generalizations drawn here today given
